creator: sa2c@sa2c.net
text:
With upgrade of fontconfig 2.4.2, including source of ~/.fonts.conf was
changed from "etc/fonts/fonts.conf" to "etc/fonts/conf.d/50-user.conf".

Currently, this port installs conf file as "2.ipa-ttfonts.conf".  This
has precedence over ~/.fonts.conf, and users can't override the alias
for "serif", "sans-serif", and "monospace".

The fontconfig port installs alias configurations as "60-latin.conf"
and "65-nonlatin.conf", so I think it's best to insert conf file for
this port between them.

In addition, this patch splits hint related stuff into
"20-ipa-ttfonts-hint.conf", so that users can override.

Fix: Please note to run before commit:

cvs add files/20-ipa-ttfonts-hint.conf files/62-ipa-ttfonts.conf
cvs delete -f files/2.ipa-ttfonts.conf
